ConzentCmp.ConzentCmpDescription: Cookie Consent Management Platform from Conzent - GDPR, CCPA & ePrivacy compliant
ConzentCmp.WebsiteKeyDescription: Your Conzent Website Key. Find it in the Conzent dashboard under Sites.
